caption: The video presents a technical presentation regarding "Logging in Kubernetes Workflow," featuring a slide that explains how a "Raw message encapsulated in JSON" is structured. The screen displays a file path, "/var/log/containers/apache-logs_default_apache-792bba.log", with a red arrow pointing down to a JSON code block. This block contains fields for "log", "stream", and "time", with the log value showing a specific request: "\"78.170.117.242 -- [19/Nov/2020:22:06:45 +0000] \\\"GET /go HTTP/1.0\\\" 200 2216\n\"". In the upper right corner of each frame, a small inset video shows a woman with dark hair wearing a pink top. Across the sequence, the visual content of the slide and the woman's position remain static, indicating a steady presentation of the information without any visible movement or transitions.
